title: Tomb's Textures - GUI Pack
description: 16x - A fun, yet simple UI overhaul that makes menu's more appealing
body:
![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8373608e1b639fb64b2ee13b12e0ec8e13189b5b.png)

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b6c4bec9713ef7c548ef5a58ed8a10115ba5251_0.webp)
This pack aims to spruce up the default GUI with refreshing designs. This is a project that I've wanted to create for a while, made for the challenge as this will be my first attempt at it, If you have any reviews, suggestions or overall feedback for this texture pack, You can always message me on discord :)

I hope you enjoy it and thank you very much for stopping by.


![Progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c131ff836b438b1ae9abeab8e472176faaa3aa1_0.webp)
Please remember: **This Texture Pack is still in development**, things will update and change as time goes on.

<details>
<summary>Finished Textures</summary>

- ✅ Menu
- ✅ Inventory
- ✅ Chest  
- ✅ Crafting Table  
- ✅ Crafter  
- ✅ Smoker  
- ✅ Blast Furnace
- ✅ Shulker Box      
</details>

<details>
<summary>Unfinished Textures</summary>

- ◻️ Enchanting Table    
- ◻️ Furnace  
- ◻️ Grindstone  
- ◻️ Dispenser  
- ◻️ Loom  
- ◻️ Beacon Menu  
- ◻️ Brewing Stand  
- ◻️ Cartography Table  
- ◻️ Hopper  
- ◻️ Stone Cutter  
- ◻️ Smithing Table  
- ◻️ Villager UI  
</details>

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ca61a9c1e7dbe2e5fd474ec9518e6f0162f610.png)

![Community](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbaa0b494abc38cbb59cbc2872fd8892824a8357_0.webp)
